articles.author: Arshad R. Zargar
articles.title: Rapid rise of "Cockroach Janta Party" online protest movement appears to spook India's leaders - CBS News
articles.description: The satirical "Cockroach Janta Party" calls itself a "political front of the youth, by the youth, for the youth." India's government may be trying to squash it.
articles.content: New Delhi — India's political establishment has a cockroach problem, and the government seems to be taking it seriously. The infestation is not of insects, however, but millions of young Indians taki… [+6017 chars]
